title: Small Mart Daily Close Checklist
description: Checks whether an AI-assisted small mart daily close has the cash, inventory, cold case, security, and manager approval evidence needed before the store is marked closed.

evidence.title: Register Z report captured
evidence.recommendation: Capture end-of-day POS totals before closing the store.

evidence.title: Cash safe or deposit log completed
evidence.recommendation: Record cash count, safe drop, deposit bag, and responsible staff member.

evidence.title: Refund and void log reviewed
evidence.recommendation: Review refunds, voids, manual discounts, and cancelled transactions.

evidence.title: Age-restricted sales log reviewed
evidence.recommendation: Review tobacco, alcohol, lottery, or other restricted item logs where applicable.

evidence.title: Cold case temperature log completed
evidence.recommendation: Record cooler, freezer, and prepared food case temperatures before closing.

evidence.title: Damage and shrink log completed
evidence.recommendation: Record damaged, expired, stolen, or missing inventory.

evidence.title: Security and alarm check completed
evidence.recommendation: Confirm doors, cameras, alarm, safe, and restricted inventory cabinets are secured.

evidence.title: Incident log reviewed
evidence.recommendation: Review customer incidents, safety issues, equipment failures, theft notes, or staff reports.

approvals.title: Manager sign-off recorded
approvals.recommendation: A manager or owner must sign off before the agent marks the mart daily close complete.

thresholds.title: Cash variance exceeds mart threshold
thresholds.recommendation: Escalate cash variance above $10 to a manager before closing.

thresholds.title: Cold case temperature exceeds mart threshold
thresholds.recommendation: Escalate cold case temperature above 41F and follow store food safety policy.

blockedActions.title: Mart daily close cannot be marked complete without manager sign-off
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to complete the mart daily close without the required manager approval.
blockedActions.recommendation: Pause the close, request manager sign-off, then rerun the SOP check.

blockedActions.title: Age-restricted sale without verification is blocked
blockedActions.reason: The workflow attempts to approve an age-restricted sale without verification.
blockedActions.recommendation: Stop the sale and require the store's age-verification procedure.

blockedActions.title: Store close with unsecured cash is blocked
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to close before cash and security evidence are recorded.
blockedActions.recommendation: Secure cash, confirm alarm and doors, then rerun the SOP check.
